source_files: _DATA - FOURNISSEURS_/Hebei Yuanfeng Import And Export Trading Co., Ltd/SONGWAYPET.json

incident_20260515.summary: Supplier/forwarder refused DDP/customs clearance because catnip was considered plant material; several freight forwarders reportedly returned the same conclusion.
incident_20260515.buyer_decision: Do not ship; do not accept buyer customs clearance or DAP switch without new business cadrage; refund requested and accepted.

future_run_guardrail: No future RUN with this supplier unless written forwarder confirmation covers exact product, catnip/silvervine/gallfruit/natural plant material, DDP door-to-door Amazon FBA France, customs clearance handled by supplier/forwarder, and no buyer customs clearance required.
